---
title: "LMU Open Science Center"
page-navigation: false
toc: false
repo-actions: false
format:
  html:
    anchor-sections: false
    page-layout: full
    grid:
      sidebar-width: 0px
      body-width: 1250px
      margin-width: 200px
      gutter-width: 2em
title-block-banner: "assets/img/osc_image_assets/Banner1.jpg"
listing:
  - id: news-carousel
    template: news/news.ejs
    contents: news/news
    sort: "date desc"
  - id: events-carousel
    template: events/events.ejs
    contents: events/events/*.qmd
    sort: "date desc"
include-after-body:
  - text: |
      <script src="/assets/javascript/remove_title.js" defer></script>
include-in-header:
  - text: |
      <meta name="viewport" content="width=device-width, initial-scale=1.0">
      <script src="/assets/javascript/clear_filter_button.js" defer></script>
      <script src="assets/javascript/impact_counter.js" defer></script>
      <style>

      :root {
        --green-main:         #00883A;
        --green-dark:         #006b2d;
        --green-light:        #a6c871;
        --green-pale:         #f7fcf7f2;
        --green-border:       #00883b70;
        --green-border-solid: #00883b79;
        --green-500:          #00883A;
        --green-300:          #4caf74;
        --green-100:          #d4eddf;
        --green-50:           #f7fcf7;
        --ink:                #333;
        --muted:              #555;
        --border:             #00883b40;
        --white:              #ffffff;

        --ff-display: 'DM Serif Display', Georgia, serif;
        --ff-body:    'DM Sans', system-ui, sans-serif;

        --radius-sm: 6px;
        --radius-md: 12px;
        --radius-lg: 20px;

        --shadow-sm: 0 1px 4px rgba(0,0,0,0.06), 0 2px 12px rgba(0,0,0,0.04);
        --shadow-md: 0 4px 20px rgba(0,0,0,0.08), 0 1px 4px rgba(0,0,0,0.04);
        --shadow-lg: 0 12px 40px rgba(0,0,0,0.10), 0 2px 8px rgba(0,0,0,0.04);

        --transition: 0.25s cubic-bezier(0.4, 0, 0.2, 1);

        /* ── Single source of truth for spacing ── */
        --section-py:    4rem;    /* vertical padding for all sections   */
        --section-px:    2rem;    /* horizontal padding for all sections */
        --inner-gap:     1.5rem;  /* gap between eyebrow → title → body  */
        --item-gap:      0.6rem;  /* gap between checklist items, etc.   */
      }

      body {
        /*font-family: var(--ff-body);*/
        color: var(--ink);
        background: var(--white);
      }

      /* =============================================
         BANNER
         ============================================= */
      .quarto-title-block .quarto-title-banner {
        background-position-y: center;
        height: 400px;
        position: relative;
        margin-bottom: 0;
        
      }
      .quarto-title-block .quarto-title-banner::after {
        content: '';
        position: absolute;
        inset: 0;
        background: linear-gradient(
          135deg,
          rgba(0,65,28,0.08) 0%,
          rgba(0,136,59,0.03) 60%,
          rgba(0,0,0,0.10) 100%
        );
        pointer-events: none;
      }

      /* =============================================
         SHARED SECTION STYLES
         ============================================= */
      .osc-section {
        padding: var(--section-py) var(--section-px);
      }
      .osc-section-inner {
        max-width: 1100px !important;
        margin: 0 auto;
      }
      .section-eyebrow {
        letter-spacing: 0.18em;
        color: var(--green-500);
        /* no extra margin here — controlled by mb-2 utility in markup */
      }
      .section-title {
        font-size: clamp(1.6rem, 3vw, 1.7rem);
        margin: 0 0 var(--inner-gap);
        line-height: 1.3;
      }

      /* =============================================
         IMPACT STRIP
         ============================================= */
      .impact-container {
        background: var(--green-50);
        border-top:    1px solid var(--green-border);
        border-bottom: 1px solid var(--green-border);
        padding: var(--section-py) var(--section-px);
      }
      .impact-container .metric-value {
        font-family: var(--ff-display);
        font-size: 2.6rem;
        color: var(--green-500);
        line-height: 1;
        margin-bottom: 0.35rem;
      }
      .impact-container .metric-label {
        font-size: 0.82rem;
        font-weight: 500;
        color: var(--muted);
        text-transform: uppercase;
        letter-spacing: 0.08em;
      }

      /* =============================================
         EXPLORE CARDS
         ============================================= */

         .explore-section .desc{
          max-width:600px;
         }
        .explore-card {
          border-radius: var(--radius-lg);
          transition: var(--transition);
          background: var(--white);
          text-decoration: none !important;
        }
        .explore-card::before {
          content: '';
          position: absolute;
          bottom: 0; left: 0; right: 0;
          height: 3px;
          background: var(--green-main);
          transform: scaleX(0);
          transform-origin: left;
          transition: var(--transition);
        }
        .explore-card:hover {
          border-color: var(--green-main);
          box-shadow: var(--shadow-md);
          transform: translateY(-3px);
        }
        .explore-card:hover::before { transform: scaleX(1); }
        .explore-card-icon {
          border-radius: var(--radius-md);
          background: var(--green-50);
          font-size: 1.5rem;
          color: var(--green-500);
        }

        .explore-card h3 {
          font-size: 1rem;
          font-weight: 400;
          margin: 0;
        }
        .explore-card p {
          font-size: 0.8rem;
          line-height: 1.65;
          margin: 0;
          flex-grow: 1;
        }

      .explore-card:hover .explore-card-link::after { transform: translateX(4px); }

      /* =============================================
         MISSION
         ============================================= */
      .mission-checklist {
        list-style: none;
        padding: 0;
        margin: var(--inner-gap) 0 var(--inner-gap);
        display: flex;
        flex-direction: column;
        gap: var(--item-gap);
      }
      .mission-checklist ul {
        padding-left: 0;
        margin-left: 0;
      }
      
      .mission-checklist li {
        display: flex;
        gap: 0.65rem;
        align-items: flex-start;
        font-size:0.95rem;
        color: var(--muted);
        line-height: 1.7;
      }
      .mission-check-icon {
        flex-shrink: 0;
        width: 18px; height: 18px;
        border-radius: 50%;
        background: #f4f1f1;
        color: var(--green-main);
        display: flex;
        align-items: center;
        justify-content: center;
        font-size: 0.6rem;
        margin-top: 0.15rem;
      }
      .mission-visual {
        background: var(--green-main);
        border-radius: var(--radius-lg);
        padding: 2rem;
        color: var(--white);
        position: relative;
        overflow: hidden;
      }
      .mission-visual::before {
        content: '';
        position: absolute;
        top: -40%; right: -30%;
        width: 300px; height: 300px;
        border-radius: 50%;
        background: radial-gradient(circle, rgba(166,200,113,0.25) 0%, transparent 70%);
        pointer-events: none;
      }

      .mission-statement-btn.btn.btn-primary {
        background: var(--green-500);
        color: var(--white) !important;
        border-color: var(--green-500);
        border-radius: var(--radius-sm);
        transition: var(--transition);
        box-shadow: 0 3px 12px rgba(0,136,58,0.28);
      }
      .mission-statement-btn.btn.btn-primary:hover {
        background: var(--green-dark);
        border-color: var(--green-dark);
        transform: translateY(-2px);
        box-shadow: 0 6px 20px rgba(0,136,58,0.35);
      }

      /* =============================================
         NEWSLETTER 
         ============================================= */

         .newsletter-section {
          background: var(--green-main);
          border-radius: var(--radius-lg);
          gap: 0.3rem;
          position: relative;
          overflow: hidden;
        }

        .newsletter-section::before {
          content: '';
          position: absolute;
          top: -40%; right: -30%;
          width: 250px; height: 250px;
          border-radius: 50%;
          background: radial-gradient(circle, rgba(167, 200, 113, 0.19) 0%, transparent 70%);
          pointer-events: none;
        }

        .newsletter-btn.btn {
          transition: color 0.25s ease;       
          cursor: pointer;                        
        }

        .newsletter-btn.btn:hover,
        .newsletter-btn.btn:active,
        .newsletter-btn.btn:focus{
          background: #ffffff50 !important;
          color:white !important;
          border: 1px solid white !important;
        }


      /* =============================================
         TESTIMONIAL
         ============================================= */

         .testimonial-container {
            background: var(--green-main);
            padding: var(--section-py) var(--section-px);
          }

          .testimonial-inner {
            max-width: 1100px;
            margin: 0 auto;
          }

          .testimonial-inner blockquote {
            font-family: var(--ff-display);
            font-size: clamp(1.1rem, 2.5vw, 1.4rem);
            font-style: italic;
            line-height: 1.65;
            color: rgba(255,255,255,0.92);
            border: none;
            padding: 0;
            margin: 0 0 1.25rem;
          }

          .testimonial-inner strong {
            font-size: 0.88rem;
            font-weight: 600;
            color: rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.82);
            letter-spacing: 0.04em;
          }
      /* =============================================
         NEWS & EVENTS
         ============================================= */
      .highlights-section {
        background: var(--white);
      }

      /* =============================================
         RESPONSIVE
         ============================================= */
      @media (max-width: 991px) {
        :root {
          --section-py: 3rem;
          --section-px: 1.5rem;
        }
      }
      @media (max-width: 600px) {
        :root {
          --section-py: 2.5rem;
          --section-px: 1rem;
        }
      }

      </style>
      <link href="/assets/bootstrap-5.3.8-dist/css/bootstrap.min.css" rel="stylesheet">
css: /custom-navbar.css
---


<!-- ══════════════════════════════════════
     MISSION + NEWSLETTER
════════════════════════════════════════ -->
::: {.osc-section}
::: {.container}

::: {.row .align-items-center .gx-5}
::: {.col-lg-8}

[Our mission]{.text-uppercase .small .fw-semibold .mb-2 .section-eyebrow}

## The interdisciplinary LMU Open Science Center (OSC) is a researcher-led initiative supporting LMU Munich by embedding open, responsible, and reproducible practices at the core of research excellence. {.mb-3 .section-title .text-muted}

::: {.mission-checklist}
- [✓]{.mission-check-icon} Essential training in the highest standards of reproducible research methods
- [✓]{.mission-check-icon} Digital sovereignty and resilience to global challenges through open source workflows
- [✓]{.mission-check-icon} Transparency as foundation for trust and evidence-based societal debates
- [✓]{.mission-check-icon} Reliable scientific data as a critical foundation for responsible AI, digitalisation, and societal translation
:::

[Learn More About OSC](about/index.qmd){.btn .btn-primary .mission-statement-btn}

:::

::: {.col-lg-4}
::: {.newsletter-section .d-flex .flex-column .justify-content-center .text-center .p-5 .text-white}

**Stay updated with the OSC.**

Sign up to our mailing list for workshops, events, and resources.

[Subscribe](https://lists.lrz.de/mailman/listinfo/lmu-osc){.btn .btn-outline-light .newsletter-btn}

:::
:::
:::

:::
:::


<!-- ══════════════════════════════════════
     IMPACT METRICS
════════════════════════════════════════ -->
::: {.row .mx-auto .w-100 .align-items-center .justify-content-center .impact-container}

::: {.col .text-center}
::: {.metric-value data-target="100+"}
0
:::
::: {.metric-label}
Members
:::
:::

::: {.col .text-center}
::: {.metric-value data-target="50+"}
0
:::
::: {.metric-label}
Events per year
:::
:::

::: {.col .text-center}
::: {.metric-value data-target="15+"}
0
:::
::: {.metric-label}
OS Publications
:::
:::

::: {.col .text-center}
::: {.metric-value data-target="1000+"}
0
:::
::: {.metric-label}
Researchers Trained
:::
:::

::: {.col .text-center}
::: {.metric-value data-target="10"}
0
:::
::: {.metric-label}
Awards Won
:::
:::

:::


<!-- ══════════════════════════════════════
     NEWS & EVENTS
════════════════════════════════════════ -->
::: {.osc-section .highlights-section}
::: {.osc-section-inner}

[Stay in the loop]{.text-uppercase .section-eyebrow .small .fw-semibold .mb-2}

## Latest highlights {.mb-3 .section-title .text-muted}

::: {.row}

::: {.col-md-6}
::: {#news-carousel}
:::
:::

::: {.col-md-6}
::: {#events-carousel}
:::
:::

:::

:::
:::


<!-- ══════════════════════════════════════
     TESTIMONIAL
════════════════════════════════════════ -->
::: {.testimonial-container .text-align-center}
::: {.testimonial-inner}

> "Open Science at LMU has completely changed how I think about collaboration and research transparency. The summer school made it easy to adopt reproducible workflows from day one."

**— PhD Student, Life Sciences**

:::
:::


<!-- ══════════════════════════════════════
     EXPLORE CARDS (optional)
════════════════════════════════════════ -->
::: {.osc-section}
::: {.container .osc-section-inner .explore-section}

[What we offer]{.text-uppercase .text-success .small .fw-semibold .mb-2 .section-eyebrow}

## Explore the OSC {.mb-3 .text-muted}

::: {.text-muted .mb-4 .desc}
Whether you're a student, early-career researcher, or faculty — there's a place for you in the open science community.
:::

::: {.row .row-cols-1 .row-cols-md-2 .row-cols-lg-3 .g-4}

::: {.col}

<div class="card explore-card h-100 border border-success-subtle rounded-3 shadow-sm">
<div class="card-body d-flex flex-column p-4">
<div class="bg-success bg-opacity-10 text-success rounded-3 d-inline-flex  text-center align-items-center justify-content-center mb-3" style="width:50px;height:50px;">
<i class="bi bi-people fs-5"></i>
</div>
<h5 class="fw-normal text-black mb-2">Our Community</h5>
<p class="text-muted flex-grow-1">Meet the researchers, advocates, and partners shaping open science at LMU and beyond.</p>
<a href="people/members.qmd" class="text-decoration-none stretched-link fw-semibold text-success small">
Meet the OSC Community →</a>
</div>
</div>

:::

::: {.col}
<div class="card explore-card h-100 border border-success-subtle rounded-3 shadow-sm">
<div class="card-body d-flex flex-column p-4">
<div class="bg-success bg-opacity-10 text-success rounded-3 d-inline-flex text-center align-items-center justify-content-center mb-3" style="width:50px;height:50px;">
<i class="bi bi-journal-bookmark fs-5"></i>
</div>
<h5 class="fw-normal text-black mb-2">Training & Workshops</h5>
<p class="text-muted flex-grow-1">Build hands-on skills in reproducible research through OSC workshops, summer schools, and tutorials.</p>
<a href="training/index.qmd" class="text-decoration-none stretched-link fw-semibold text-success small">Explore Training →</a>
</div>
</div>

:::

::: {.col}
<div class="card explore-card h-100 border border-success-subtle rounded-3 shadow-sm">
<div class="card-body d-flex flex-column p-4">
<div class="bg-success bg-opacity-10 text-success rounded-3 d-inline-flex text-center align-items-center justify-content-center mb-3" style="width:50px;height:50px;">
<i class="bi bi-globe2 fs-5"></i>
</div>
<h5 class="fw-normal text-black mb-2">Partners & Networks</h5>
<p class="text-muted flex-grow-1">Discover our institutional collaborators and the international networks we're part of.</p>
<a href="partners/institutional_members.qmd" class="text-decoration-none stretched-link fw-semibold text-success small">See OSC Partners →</a>
</div>
</div>

:::
:::

:::
:::
